verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.9.0/R5 latest-main strict-allowlist all-market MM canary for Miami Marlins @ Athletics completed the full lifecycle: pregame setup passed, contest 9 was created and verified, moneyline speculation 15, spread speculation 16, and total speculation 17 were manually seeded/filled with zero residual seed exposure, the market maker posted tiny live moneyline, spread, and total quotes under contest allowlist [9] with seedSpeculations=false, one controlled live total quote was filled, remaining visible quotes were soft-cancelled/expired, final open exposure drained to zero, official final score Miami Marlins 12 / Athletics 5 was verified, contest 9 was scored through R5/CRE on the first request, speculations 15/16/17 settled to away/upper/Miami Marlins, away/upper/Miami Marlins +1.5, and over/upper/over 10.5, winning controlled positions were claimed, and final target commitments plus active/pending/claimable positions are zero.

capabilities.notes: Primary MIA away @ ATH home contest 9/specs 15/16/17 passed official pre-game status, identity, allowlist, odds, and lead-time gates.
SDK/CLI v0.9.0, MM head 4fcd489 with PR #145 own-state orphan safety tests, installed SDK v0.9.0, typecheck/test/build, and ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public allowances were bounded.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approvals were sent.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned contest 9 moneyline, spread, and total quote_ready; dry run would-submit remained target-scoped.
Tiny live moneyline, spread, and total commitments posted under strict allowlist [9], seedSpeculations=false.
Exactly one controlled live total fill succeeded against commitment 0xdf1762d2ce6a… using ospex-flow-a.
Telemetry captured the fill with source own-state-stream for the filled total commitment hash.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame, and no orphan MM process remained.
A scratch-state dry-run/cold-start probe loaded state cleanly, rehydrated before quote decisions, and did not create duplicate live exposure.
Official final score MIA 12, ATH 5 was verified and contest 9 scored via R5/CRE on the first request.
Moneyline speculation 15 settled to away/upper/Miami Marlins; spread 16 to away/upper/Miami Marlins +1.5; total 17 to over/upper/over 10.5.
Winning upper positions for stage-maker-a and stage-maker-b were claimed; losing positions are no-op/not claimable, and final target positions are zero.
Tiny canary risk plus protocol fees stayed within the requested cap; recorded lifecycle transactions are summarized.

Bounded 1.000000 USDC TreasuryModule approval for manual seed-maker setup fees
Bounded 0.500000 USDC PositionModule approval for controlled taker risk
Bounded 1.000000 USDC TreasuryModule approval for controlled taker setup fees
Create contest 9 for Miami Marlins @ Athletics
Fully match tiny manual moneyline seed to create speculation 15
Fully match tiny manual spread seed to create speculation 16
Fully match tiny manual total seed to create speculation 17
Controlled fill against live MM total quote
Request R5 score for contest 9 after official final
Settle moneyline speculation 15 to away/upper/Miami Marlins
Settle spread speculation 16 to away/upper/Miami Marlins +1.5
